docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-10-2025 - CONTINUED DUE TO CONDITION OF THE COURT CALENDAR TO FEB-21-2025 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF DANIEL LOPEZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JULIE LEE IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: GARRETT WONG; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-21-2025 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-25-2025 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF DANIEL LOPEZ IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT JULIE LEE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT STATED PLAINTIFF CANNOT APPEAR AS HE IS IN EUROPE. DEFENDANT STATED SHE PLANS TO PAY THE PLAINTIFF THE AMOUNT OF THE CLAIM AND REQUESTS A PROGRESS REPORT DATE ON HIS BEHALF. IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE NEXT CALLING, THIS MATTER WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: LEFT IN BLANK SERVED DEC-23-2024, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, JULIE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,150.00 FILED BY LOPEZ, DANIEL AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, JULIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-10-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE CLAIM HEARING OF APR-25-2025 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
